samples.name: cafe_reviews_extract_phrases
samples.description: Mining customer reviews for exact phrases — output should preserve customer language verbatim.

reviews: best flat white in the neighborhood, hands down
barista remembered my name on the second visit
place gets packed at 8am but the line moves fast

samples.stubbed_output: {"top_phrases":["best flat white in the neighborhood","barista remembered my name","line moves fast"],"pain_points":[],"jtbd_signals":["daily coffee ritual","local belonging"],"persona_refinement":{"primary":"neighborhood regulars who value being recognized"}}
